args.message: Hi! Thanks for having me. Has this Jeep been in any accidents?

text: Hi! Thanks for having me. Has this Jeep been in any accidents?

speaker: seller

args.message: Accidents? Not on my watch! This beauty has been meticulously cared for. I checked the history myself, and it's clean as a whistle. Ready for your next adventure, this Jeep runs great and is trail-rated for maximum fun!

args.message: That's great to hear! 118,000 miles is a bit up there. What kind of mileage can I expect out of a Jeep Wrangler of this vintage?

text: That's great to hear! 118,000 miles is a bit up there. What kind of mileage can I expect out of a Jeep Wrangler of this vintage?

speaker: seller

args.message: 118,000 miles? That's barely broken in for one of these legendary Jeeps! These 3.6L V6 engines are absolute workhorses. You can easily expect another 100,000 miles out of this engine with regular maintenance. They just don't make them like this anymore!

speaker: buyer

args.message: That sounds pretty good. I'm looking for a solid daily driver that can also handle some weekend fun. I'd be willing to offer $19,700.

text: That sounds pretty good. I'm looking for a solid daily driver that can also handle some weekend fun. I'd be willing to offer $19,700.

speaker: seller

args.message: 19,700? That's a solid offer, and I appreciate you coming in hot! However, I've seen similar Wranglers, with this low mileage and in this condition, go for way more. I'm looking to get a little closer to the asking price of $19,995. How about we meet in the middle at $19,850?
